$comment: Delphi Brain instance config — the company-agnostic seam. Copy to brain.config.json and fill in. The CLI reads this at startup and serves it at GET /api/config so the frontend de-hardcodes too. Replaces every place a company identity used to be baked into generic code (chat system prompt, source links, branding, default org).

org.name: Example Co
org.description: One or two sentences describing what the company does and what matters most (used to ground the chat assistant's answers).

chat.systemPromptTemplate: You are {{assistantName}}, {{org.name}}'s knowledge assistant. {{org.description}} Answer using the retrieved context. Cite the catalog/narrative path for every claim. If the context does not contain the answer, say so rather than guessing.
